ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "value_a" INTEGER /* Measurement value for variable A */,
  "value_b" INTEGER /* Measurement value for variable B */,
  "value_c" INTEGER /* Measurement value for variable C */,
  "first_category" TEXT /* Primary category associated with the observation */,
  "second_category" TEXT /* Secondary category associated with the observation */,
  "last_category" TEXT /* Tertiary category associated with the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the observation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the observation */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_second_category FOREIGN KEY ("second_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_last_category FOREIGN KEY ("last_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_first_category FOREIGN KEY ("first_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category represents */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or findings of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_reports_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the observation */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* The old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value after the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Survey A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources_observations" (
  "source_observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source-observation mapping */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_observations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_observations_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)
